hero.text: Follow your dreams; they know the way.
hero.author: Kobe Bryant

aries.general: Today is a day to assert your individuality and take bold steps forward.
aries.love: Passion ignites in your relationships; take a risk.
aries.career: Be confident in your skills today; others will notice your talent.

taurus.general: Stability is key today; focus on your foundation.
taurus.love: Trust is the cornerstone of your relationships; nurture it.
taurus.career: Hard work pays off; your dedication will be recognized.

gemini.general: Communication is vital today; express your thoughts clearly.
gemini.love: Clearing the air will deepen your connection with someone special.
gemini.career: Collaboration leads to success; seek out partnerships.

cancer.general: Emotions run high; be gentle with yourself and others.
cancer.love: Open up to your partner about your feelings to strengthen your bond.
cancer.career: Creativity flows; use it to your advantage at work.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today; embrace the spotlight.
leo.love: Romance is in the air; plan a fun date and enjoy.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise; don’t hesitate to take charge.

virgo.general: Focus on details today; precision leads to success.
virgo.love: Small gestures mean a lot; show appreciation to your loved ones.
virgo.career: Analytical thinking will help solve problems at work.

libra.general: Balance is essential; find harmony in all aspects of life.
libra.love: Seek compromise in your relationships for more peace.
libra.career: Networking could lead to new opportunities; connect with others.

scorpio.general: Intuition is heightened; trust your instincts today.
scorpio.love: Passionate exchanges can lead to deeper connections.
scorpio.career: Focus on your goals; ambition will fuel your success.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; take a spontaneous trip or try something new.
sagittarius.love: A sense of freedom enhances your romantic life today.
sagittarius.career: Innovative ideas will be appreciated; share them boldly.

capricorn.general: Discipline and focus will bring you closer to your goals.
capricorn.love: Show your commitment in a tangible way to foster intimacy.
capricorn.career: Strategic planning is key; outline your next steps carefully.

aquarius.general: Think outside the box; unconventional solutions lead to progress.
aquarius.love: Embrace your uniqueness; it’s what attracts others to you.
aquarius.career: Collaboration will enhance productivity; join forces with a colleague.

pisces.general: Embrace your emotional side; creativity flows today.
pisces.love: A whimsical romantic gesture will bring joy to your relationship.
pisces.career: Follow your intuition for successful decision-making.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Success is not just about what you accomplish in your life, it's about what you inspire others to do.
professional.author: Unknown

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

captions.text: Chasing dreams, one step at a time.
Living for the moments that take your breath away.

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: It’s not a faith in technology. It’s faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

tech.text: We are all now connected by the internet, like neurons in a giant brain.
tech.author: Stephen Hawking

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: I never want to stop making memories with you.
The best way to pay for a lovely moment is to enjoy it.
Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything that is done in this world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
faith.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
It is not the length of life, but the depth of life.
faith.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.
wisdom.author: Henry Ford

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
wisdom.author: Jean Jacques Rousseau

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha
